---
name: Project / File Structure Setup
about: Establish repository structure and contributor-ready setup
labels: [mapping]
---

## Objective
Create a clean repository structure and contributor-ready setup for collaborative mapping work.

## Scope
- Folder structure
- Naming conventions
- Base docs and ignore/config files

## Checklist
- [ ] Create/confirm top-level folders for map files, assets, docs, and references
- [ ] Define and document naming conventions for difficulties and versions
- [ ] Add/update `.gitignore` for generated/temp/editor-specific files
- [ ] Add/update README with:
  - [ ] Project purpose
  - [ ] Quick start for contributors
  - [ ] Local test workflow
  - [ ] Contribution/PR instructions
- [ ] Add a simple “where things go” file map in docs/README
- [ ] Validate setup by having at least one collaborator follow docs successfully

## Acceptance Criteria
- Repo layout is consistent and documented
- Naming conventions are enforced in existing files
- New contributor can clone and run test workflow using docs only

## Deliverables
- Commit(s) establishing structure and docs
- Issue comment confirming validation run
